description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 26 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 51 mins. His coding was mostly in Java (49%), along with Other (33%) and Markdown (17%). The activity data shows work across 5 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos this week.
